_comment: Expected metadata for each demo source. The pipeline generates 'category' and 'document_summary' automatically at ingestion via the LLM classifier; this file documents the expected classification so you can verify the classifier is working. 'category' must be one of: HR, Finance, Operations, IT.

documents.expected_summary: Employee handbook covering paid time off, sick leave, remote work, and statutory holidays.
Benefits and enrollment guide covering eligibility, health/dental plans, 401k match, and open enrollment.
Annotated travel and expense policy covering submission deadlines, per diem, lodging caps, and corporate cards.
Procurement and purchasing policy covering requisitions, approval thresholds, vendors, and payment terms.
Scanned operations runbook for shift-to-shift handover procedure and escalation matrix.
IT acceptable use and security policy covering MFA, device handling, AI tools, and incident reporting.
Intranet help page on requesting software, hardware, and system access through the IT service desk.
